name: High-Tax Exception for Subpart F Income

eligibility.description: CFCs operating in high-tax jurisdictions where the foreign effective tax rate exceeds 18.9% (90% of the current 21% U.S. rate).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes items of income from foreign base company income if they were subject to an effective foreign tax rate greater than 90% of the maximum U.S. corporate tax rate.
